details.description: Production LibreChat after the visible-artifact-limit release and before the generated-files tab

change_summary.expected_result: The native My Files dialog keeps the existing upload list under an Uploads tab and shows current-user assistant-delivered generated files under a separate Generated Files tab with search, pagination, source conversation, and authenticated download.
functions: Add an authenticated current-user generated-files API derived from visible assistant message references
Join referenced artifacts to owner-scoped execute_code file records and exclude intermediate roles
Add Uploads and Generated Files tabs without replacing or reimplementing the native upload table
Show filename, type, size, source conversation, generated time, search, pagination, refresh, and download
Keep generated-file browsing separate from model context and conversation attachment selection
limitations: The tab lists files still present in the files collection; deleted or retention-expired files are not shown
The browser enhancement currently recognizes the Chinese and English My Files dialog titles
Generated-file deletion remains in the native file-management path and is not duplicated in this tab
change_summary.reason: Generated outputs are downloadable from assistant messages but are absent from the native My Files surface, so users cannot browse prior deliverables separately from uploaded source files.
change_summary.risk: Protected Client and authenticated API route change. A selector drift could prevent the tab from appearing, or an ownership/filter regression could return the wrong file set. Deployment uses immutable versioned assets, exact Client/user-route baselines, a Compose backup, automatic rollback, and recreates only LibreChat-API.

details.command: Restore the timestamp-matched /opt/librechat/backups/generated-files-tab-*/compose.override.yaml to /opt/librechat/compose.override.yaml, recreate only LibreChat-API, then verify /, /api/config, /api/user/usage-dashboard, /office/, the native My Files upload table, and generated download cards.

validation_plan.expected: Owner binding, assistant-only references, intermediate exclusion, execute_code filtering, pagination, download paths, Client tabs, search, and accessibility markers pass.

validation_plan.command: Local browser fixture acceptance at scripts/fixture.html
validation_plan.expected: Upload and generated sections switch without overlap, the original upload table is restored exactly, and the generated view fits a 720px-high viewport without dialog scrolling.

validation_plan.command: Authenticated vip998 My Files acceptance without a model request
validation_plan.expected: The acceptance PPTX appears once under Generated Files, the uploaded XLSX remains under Uploads, hidden QA artifacts are absent, search works, and download succeeds.
